zh.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres於1175年出生在西班牙。他和Dama de Torres至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres于1175年出生在西班牙。他和Dama de Torres至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Torres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Rafael.  Portuguese Ligia, Anatolio, Catarina, Paulo, Albeiro, Gonsalo, Joaquim, Lidio, Omero, Wenceslao.

Galician, Catalan, Spanish, Portuguese, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Torres, all named with the plural of torre ‘tower’ (see Torre ). As a Jewish name, it was often adopted at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics. Compare De Torres .
Italian: habitational name from Torres in Belluno or Porto Torres in Sassari. In southern Italy the surname is sometimes of Spanish origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Torrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Carlos, Jesus, Armando, Raul, Ruben, Alfredo, Alvaro, Fernando.
Spanish (Tórrez): variant of Torres .

variants.name: Torre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Salvatore, Carmelo, Vito, Antonio, Carmine, Pietro, Sal, Sebastiano, Agostino, Bartolo.  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Carlos, Julio, Alvaro, Eduardo, Elvira, Ernesto, Fernando, Gregorio, Guillermo, Jorge.

Italian: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, torre (from Latin turris), usually a defensive fortification or watchtower, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, as for example Torre Annunziata or Torre del Greco in Naples province, Torre de’ Passeri (Pescara, Abruzzo), or Torre di Ruggiero (Catanzaro, Calabria). Compare La Torre .

Galician, Catalan, Aragonese, Spanish, and Portuguese: topographic name from torre ‘(watch) tower’ (of the same etymology as 1), or a habitational name from any of numerous places called (La) Torre in Spain and Portugal. Compare Spanish De la Torre and La Torre .

nameMeanings.name: Martin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Martinus. This was probably originally derived from Mars (genitive Martis), the name of the Roman god of war (and earlier of fertility). Martin became very popular in the Middle Ages, especially on the Continent, as a result of the fame of St Martin of Tours . He was born the son of a Roman officer in Upper Pannonia (an outpost of the Roman Empire, now part of Hungary), and, although he became a leading figure in the 4th-century Church, he is chiefly remembered now for having divided his cloak in two and given half to a beggar. The name was also borne by five popes, including one who defended Roman Catholic dogma against Eastern Orthodox theology. He died after suffering imprisonment and privations in Naxos and public humiliation in Constantinople, and was promptly acclaimed a martyr by supporters of the Roman Church. Among Protestants, the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the German theologian Martin Luther ( 1483–1546 ); Martin was used as a symbolic name for the Protestant Church in satires by both Dryden and Swift. A further influence may be its use as the given name of the civil-rights leader Martin Luther King ( 1929–68 ).

variants.name: Martyn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Martin .

nameMeanings.name: Alvarez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Ramon, Pedro, Miguel, Roberto.  Portuguese Catarina, Lidio, Ligia, Joaquim, Wenceslao.
Spanish (Álvarez): patronymic from the personal name Álvaro (see Alvaro ). Compare Alavarez , Albares , Albarez , Alvares , and Alverez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Alverez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Alfredo, Francisco, Mario, Miguel, Ramon, Carlos, Javier, Luis, Manuel, Marcelino.
Hispanic (Álverez): altered form of Spanish Álvarez (see Alvarez ).

variants.name: Albares
meanings: Spanish: variant of Álvarez (see Alvarez ).

variants.name: Alavarez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Álvarez (see Alvarez ).

variants.name: Alvaro
meanings: Visigothic: of uncertain etymology.

variants.name: Albarez
meanings: Spanish (Álbarez): variant of Álvarez (see Alvarez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres was born in 1175, in Spain. He had at least 1 daughter with Dama de Torres.

fr.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres est né en 1175, à Espagne. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Dama de Torres.

de.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres wurde 1175 in Spanien geboren. Er hatte mit Dama de Torres mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres è nato il nel 1175 nel Spagna. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Dama de Torres.

ja.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torresは1175年にスペインで生まれた。彼はDama de Torresとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres(은)는 1175년 스페인에서 태어났다. 그는 Dama de Torres(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres nasceu em 1175, em Espanha. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Dama de Torres.

ru.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres родился в 1175 г. в местности Испания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Dama de Torres.

es.lifeSummary: Martin Alvarez de Torres nació en 1175, en España. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Dama de Torres.
